subcodes.first_line: Praise be to Him Who hath rent asunder the veils, lifted the coverings, and dispersed the barriers, whereupon the lights shone forth upon all regions [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمدا لمن هتک الاستار و کشف النقاب و ازاح الحجاب فاشرقت الانوار علی الاقطار و
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @praise and encouragement
